purpose: Track in-game Palpedia partner-skill verification progress. One row per pal. Screenshots are permanent evidence.

screenshotPolicy.note: Every user-provided screenshot must be saved under evidence/ with a unique filename. Do not replace or remove prior screenshots; add new files if retaken.

statusValues.partial: Some fields verified or evidence saved but incomplete
statusValues.verified: Partner skill text confirmed from in-game Palpedia screenshot

partnerSkills.name: Fluffy Shield
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Cat Helper
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by (100~200). (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Egg Layer
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Lifmunk Recoil
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.

partnerSkills.name: Surfing Slam
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

partnerSkills.name: Fire Tackle
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

partnerSkills.name: Dig Here!
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Zephyr Glider
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

partnerSkills.name: Jolt Glider
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

partnerSkills.name: Fluffy Wool
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Leap Stance
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by (50~86)%.

partnerSkills.name: Shadow Stance
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Herbil Pulse
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore (30~60)% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.

partnerSkills.name: Soothing Shower
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, restores (20~40)% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) (120-second cooldown after activation)

partnerSkills.name: Logging Assistance
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, improves logging efficiency by (30~50)% and reduces weight of all types of wood by (40~60)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Best Boy
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Happy Clover
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Jolt Bomb
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Electric explosion upon impact.

partnerSkills.name: Cold Bomb
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Ice explosion upon impact.

partnerSkills.name: Caffeine Inoculation
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by (100~900)%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Pengullet Launcher
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

partnerSkills.name: Pengullet Lux Launcher
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

partnerSkills.name: Brave Sailor
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, Fire Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Unyielding Storm Commander
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Water damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Dark Knowledge
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Pacapaca Wool
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Kingpaca's Defense and Movement Speed. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Pecapaca Wool
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be Ridden. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: King of Muscles
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

partnerSkills.name: Coldhearted King
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

partnerSkills.name: King of Muscles
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in a team, Kingpaca Cryst helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

partnerSkills.name: Dream Chaser
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

partnerSkills.name: Cheery Rifle
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

partnerSkills.name: Chipper Chimp Gunfire
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

partnerSkills.name: Kuudere
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, detects the location of nearby Pal Effigies.

partnerSkills.name: Magma Tears
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by (0.1~0.5)% per second outside of combat. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Tiny Spark
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Defense of Fire Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Gold Digger
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Gold Digger
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to a Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Ice Whispers
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Icy Whispers
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Hard Head
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases efficiency of destroying Stone by (500~2000)%.

partnerSkills.name: Huggy Fire
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

partnerSkills.name: Huggy Frost
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

partnerSkills.name: Fried Squid
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

partnerSkills.name: Fried Killamari
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

partnerSkills.name: Mining Assistance
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, improves player mining efficiency by (30~60)% and reduces Stone weight by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Ore Detector
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, generates subtle vibrations to detect nearby ore.

partnerSkills.name: Guardian of the Forest
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted and increases lumbering efficiency by (220~500)%.

partnerSkills.name: Guardian of the Golden Forest
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While at a base, increases the Lumbering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Direhowl Rider
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts.

partnerSkills.name: Berry Picker
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores (100~200) Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Venom Picker
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores (100~200) Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Fluffy
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Attack and Defense of Sweepa.

partnerSkills.name: King of Fluff
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (12~24)% for each Swee in party.

partnerSkills.name: Spikey Carrier
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, reduces Ore weight by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Shiny Hauler
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, reduces weight of Sulfur and Coal by (80~100)%. Also improves player's and Pals' Ground damage to enemy weak points by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Flying Trapeze
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables slow ascension while gliding.

partnerSkills.name: Winter Trapeze
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables slow ascension while gliding.

partnerSkills.name: Candy Pop
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by (-10~-20)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Bitter Pop
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by (-15~-25)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Milk Maker
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Sometimes drops Milk when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Waterwing Dance
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

partnerSkills.name: Icewing Dance
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

partnerSkills.name: Static Electricity
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Attack of Electric Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Electric Organ when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Aqua Spout
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Attack of Water Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Aquatic Pal Fluids when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Lava Spout
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Attack of Fire Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Happy-Go-Lucky Bunny
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) While at a base, increases the Handiwork Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Skilled Fingers
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in team, increases Attack of Neutral Pals. While at a base, increases work efficiency when working at Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, and other related facilities.

partnerSkills.name: Grass Weaver
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in team, increases Attack of Grass Pals. While at a base, increases work efficiency when working at Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, and other related facilities.

partnerSkills.name: Ground 'n' Pound
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Grass damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack) Increases efficiency by (200~400)% when working at a Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, or other related facilities.

partnerSkills.name: Jelliette Drop
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases items obtained from fishing by (55~95)%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jelliette's watering speed increases by (50~120)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Jellroy Drop
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases items obtained from salvaging by (55~95)%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy's watering speed increases by (50~120)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Magical Twin Powers
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Sticky Princess
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, the capture gauge decreases (12~35)% more slowly while the bars are not overlapping during the fishing minigame. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Cephalo-Princess
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Defense of Water Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Galeclaw Glider
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.

partnerSkills.name: Galeclaw Rider
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in team, boosts the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.

partnerSkills.name: Death-Cheating Feline
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases the capture rate when awarded a back bonus. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Travel Companion
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount.

partnerSkills.name: Ultrasonic Sensor
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect nearby dungeons, treasure chests, and scrap.

partnerSkills.name: Eggbomb Launcher
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher.

partnerSkills.name: Swift Deity
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Electric damage to weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Frigid Deity
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

partnerSkills.name: Angry Shark
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Aqua Gun. When this Pal uses Aqua Gun, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by (10~20)%.

partnerSkills.name: Angry Shark
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Spirit Fire. When this Pal uses Spirit Fire, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by (10~20)%.

partnerSkills.name: Dark Gleam Strike
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Jumping Claw. When this Pal uses Jumping Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Frozen Gleam Strike
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Snow Claw. When this Pal uses Snow Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Eerie Nightstreaker
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, grants Night Vision to see in dark places. Activate again to turn off. Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Telepeck
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Phantom Peck.

partnerSkills.name: Warm Body
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Cold Resistance +2. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Fluffy Flutterer
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Freeze. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Princess Gaze
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Attack of Grass Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Mysterious Scales
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Poison Fog. While at a base, increases the Farming Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Crackle Booster
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While at a base, increases the Generating Electricity Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Amicable Holy Dragon
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, Dark Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Amicable Water Dragon
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Fire damage and are immune to Burn. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Aerial Marauder
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by (20~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Aerial Marauder
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by (30~50)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Life Steal
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat a life steal effect that restores (5~9)% of damage dealt as Health.

partnerSkills.name: Purification of Gaia
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, Ground Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops various seeds when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Worker Bee
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Elizabee's Attack. Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Queen Bee Command
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: This Pal's Attack increases by (12~24)% for each Beegarde in party.

partnerSkills.name: Heart Drain
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While fighting together, grants the player and Lovander a life steal effect that restores (5~9)% of damage dealt as Health.

partnerSkills.name: Glaring Cat's Eye
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While in party, picking up a Pal Egg has a (50~75)% chance of receiving one extra. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Plump Body
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Enhances Neutral attacks while mounted.

partnerSkills.name: Tarantriss’ Web
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. Additionally, can shoot spider web to grapple and move at high speed.

partnerSkills.name: Rider of the Snowy Mountain
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (80~160)% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes.

partnerSkills.name: Snowy Mountain Slider
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (80~160)% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes. While it starts out slow, the top speed it can hit while sliding is no joke.

partnerSkills.name: Sixth Sense
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, utilizes its sixth sense to detect nearby dungeons.

partnerSkills.name: Too Cool to be Seen
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Leezpunk and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for (10~20) seconds.

partnerSkills.name: Sixth Sense
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, utilizes its sixth sense to detect nearby dungeons.

partnerSkills.name: Too Cool to be Seen
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Leezpunk Ignis and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for (10~20) seconds.

partnerSkills.name: Full-Power Gorilla Mode
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat's Attack by (75~300)% for a limited time.

partnerSkills.name: Full-power Gorilla Mode
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat Terra's Attack for a limited time.

partnerSkills.name: Full-Power Gorilla Pound
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases the player's climbing speed by (50~100)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Swift Swimmer
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden to travel on water. Sometimes drops Leather when assigned to Ranch.

partnerSkills.name: Sand Swimmer
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Muddy (2~6). (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases the player's bow damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While fighting together, allows you to deal more damage to weak points.

partnerSkills.name: Hawk Eye
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While fighting together, allows you to deal more damage to weak points.

partnerSkills.name: Master Archer

partnerSkills.name: Helper Bunny
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

partnerSkills.name: Lord Fox
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Wixen changes the player's attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

partnerSkills.name: Black Fox Lord
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Wixen Noct changes the player's attack type to Dark and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

partnerSkills.name: Grimoire Collector
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When fighting together, Neutral Pals drop more items when defeated.

partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, Neutral Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. Also has a (10~50)% chance to prevent Pal Sphere consumption when thrown. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Blazing Black Magic
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While at a base, increases the Kindling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Botanical Atlas
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.

partnerSkills.name: Wings of Death
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dark and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

partnerSkills.name: Mother Nature's Menace
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Elgrove changes the player's attack type to Grass and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

partnerSkills.name: Father Winter's Threat

partnerSkills.name: Antigravity
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, spheres home in on Pals, and carrying capacity increases by (300~600). (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Wind and Clouds
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While in party, increase Defense of Dragon Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Thunder Dragon
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Defense of Electric Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Brandish Blade
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

partnerSkills.name: Flash Blade
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri.

partnerSkills.name: Void Blade
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (30~65)% but only when not in combat. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Icy Maw
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, reduces the weight of ingredient and food by (30~60)%. When paired with another Ice Pal, their Rot Speed also reduces by (-30~-80)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Gaia Crusher
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by (220~500)% and mining efficiency by (500~2000)%.

partnerSkills.name: Ice Crusher
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by (220~500)% and mining efficiency by (500~2000)%.

partnerSkills.name: Echo Chamber
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in team, Finsider helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory.

partnerSkills.name: Water Gun
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

partnerSkills.name: Ember Chamber
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, reducing the weight of weapons in your inventory by (60~100)%. Also improves player's and Pals' Fire damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Blessing of the Flower Spirit
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by (75~85)%. While at a base, increases the Planting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Passion of the Flower Spirit
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by (80~90)%. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Grass damage, and are immune to Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Selfless Discipline
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (2~6)% for each other Grass Pal in your party.

partnerSkills.name: Flameclaw Hunter
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Hellfire Claw. When this Pal uses Hellfire Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

partnerSkills.name: Darkclaw Hunter
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Nightmare Claw. When this Pal uses Nightmare Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

partnerSkills.name: Lady of Lightning

partnerSkills.name: Lady of Dark Lightning
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

partnerSkills.name: Red Hare
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

partnerSkills.name: Master Night Angler

partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by (2~6)% or each other Dragon or Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Eidrolon Ignis)

partnerSkills.name: Electro-Massage Incubation
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes to incubate eggs by (20~40)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Flower Dance
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Burning Future
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy explodes, dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

partnerSkills.name: Glorious Mist
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Soak (2~6). (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Trick-Loving Fluffle
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, when the player's Health falls below 50%, Dupin generates an explosion around the player (Fire / Power: (100~200) / Burn buildup: 777). Additionally, while the player's Health is below 50%, the player's Attack is increased by (30~50)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Dark-Nester
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Blind by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Snake's Sagacity
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Blind (2~6). (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Charming Spore
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While at a base, increases the Medicine Production Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Lantern Enchantment
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, the player's arrows explode on contact, dealing additional damage equal to (15~30)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Hidden Dark Energy
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases Defense of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Untainted Maiden
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, increases the player's Attack by (30~80)% if all Pals in party are different species. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Stage Combat
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Burn (2~6). (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Indestructible Fortress
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (60~80)% less damage from explosive attacks, and are immune to Stun. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Yellow Tank
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.

partnerSkills.name: Harvest Goddess
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by (80~90)%.

partnerSkills.name: Goddess of the Tranquil Light
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by (85~95)%.

partnerSkills.name: Ferocious Thunder Dragon
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, hitting an enemy with a bullet increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by (1~5)% for 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 30 times. (Does not stack.)

partnerSkills.name: Scorching Predator
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Ice Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Tidal Predator
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Fire Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Modified DNA
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. Enhances Dark attacks by (15~30)% while mounted.

partnerSkills.name: Celestial Darkness
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, enhances Neutral and Dark attacks by (15~30)%.

partnerSkills.name: Blizzard Crash
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with a hammer forged from Ice.

partnerSkills.name: Azure Sovereign
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack increases by (4~8)% for each other Dragon Pal in your party.

partnerSkills.name: Spore Stalwart
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Ivy-Covered, the enemy explodes, dealing additional damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack) Also grants immunity to the World Tree's Explosive Spores to both the player and their Pals.

partnerSkills.name: Mist Stalwart
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, the player's attacks inflict Poison (2~6). While in party, grants the player and party Pals immunity to Poison, and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Nightmare Iris
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Ray. When this Pal uses Nightmare Ray, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

partnerSkills.name: Nightmare Stare
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Bloom. When this Pal uses Nightmare Bloom, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

partnerSkills.name: Meteor Wings
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

partnerSkills.name: Sacred Barrier
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. While mounted, it generates a barrier that blocks all attacks. Can triple jump while mounted.

partnerSkills.name: Holy Knight of the Firmament
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted. Activate Spear Thrust to have Necromus stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem.

partnerSkills.name: Dark Knight of the Abyss
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. When Twin Spears skill is activated, a Paladius in your party will appear and attack alongside you.

partnerSkills.name: Ice Steed
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Ice and enhances Ice attacks while mounted.

partnerSkills.name: Icy Steed
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice, inflict Freeze (2~6), increases Attack by (10~40)%.

partnerSkills.name: Black Steed
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Dark, inflict Blind (2~6), increases Attack by (10~40)%.

partnerSkills.name: Steed of Darkness
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Dark and enhances Dark attacks while mounted.

partnerSkills.name: Sentinal of the Great Sea
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While fighting together, it follows up your attacks with spear strikes. Can be ridden to travel quicky across water. While mounted, it can leap high into the air over water.

partnerSkills.name: Sentinel of the Great Sea
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: While in party, it follows up the player's attacks with Water spear strikes. Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, it can leap high into the air over water.

partnerSkills.name: Aerial Missile
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

partnerSkills.name: Resonant Guardian
partnerSkills.descriptionScraped: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Only 1 can be summoned to a base. While at a base, it constantly patrols the skies and bombards intruders from high above.
